extract: Clefable (Japanese: ピクシー Pixy) is a Fairy-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. Prior to Generation VI, it was a Normal-type Pokémon. It evolves from Clefairy when exposed to a Moon Stone. It is the final form of Cleffa. Clefable can Mega Evolve into Mega Clefable using the Clefablite. Mega Clefable was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
